name: python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter
title: python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter
summary: Python logging formatter for emitting RFC5424 Syslog messages (Python 3)
description:
Python logging formatter for emitting RFC5424 Syslog messages (Python 3)
This module implements a Python logging formatter which produces well-formed
RFC5424-compatible Syslog messages to a given socket.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter because Python logging formatter for emitting RFC5424 Syslog messages (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
